lines.english: Why did the writer not get off the bus at Woodford Green?
lines.chinese: 为什么作者没有在伍德福德格林下车？
lines.raw: Why did the writer not get off the bus at Woodford Green? | 为什么作者没有在伍德福德格林下车？

lines.english: I love travelling in the country,
lines.chinese: 我喜欢在乡下旅行，
lines.raw: I love travelling in the country, | 我喜欢在乡下旅行，

lines.english: but I don't like losing my way.
lines.chinese: 但我不喜欢迷路。
lines.raw: but I don't like losing my way. | 但我不喜欢迷路。

lines.english: I went on an excursion recently,
lines.chinese: 我最近去了一次短途旅行，
lines.raw: I went on an excursion recently, | 我最近去了一次短途旅行，

lines.english: but my trip took me longer than I expected.
lines.chinese: 但我的旅程比我预期的要长。
lines.raw: but my trip took me longer than I expected. | 但我的旅程比我预期的要长。

lines.english: 'I'm going to Woodford Green,'
lines.chinese: “我要去伍德福德格林，”
lines.raw: 'I'm going to Woodford Green,' | “我要去伍德福德格林，”

lines.english: I said to the conductor as I got on the bus,
lines.chinese: 我上车时对售票员说，
lines.raw: I said to the conductor as I got on the bus, | 我上车时对售票员说，

lines.english: 'but I don't know where it is.'
lines.chinese: “但我不知道它在哪里。”
lines.raw: 'but I don't know where it is.' | “但我不知道它在哪里。”

lines.english: 'I'll tell you where to get off.' answered the conductor.
lines.chinese: “我会告诉你哪里下车。”售票员回答。
lines.raw: 'I'll tell you where to get off.' answered the conductor. | “我会告诉你哪里下车。”售票员回答。

lines.english: I sat in the front of the bus to get a good view of the countryside.
lines.chinese: 我坐在巴士前排，以便更好地欣赏乡村景色。
lines.raw: I sat in the front of the bus to get a good view of the countryside. | 我坐在巴士前排，以便更好地欣赏乡村景色。

lines.english: After some time, the bus stopped.
lines.chinese: 过了一会儿，巴士停了下来。
lines.raw: After some time, the bus stopped. | 过了一会儿，巴士停了下来。

lines.english: Looking round, I realized with a shock that I was the only passenger left on the bus.
lines.chinese: 我环顾四周，震惊地发现我是车上唯一的乘客了。
lines.raw: Looking round, I realized with a shock that I was the only passenger left on the bus. | 我环顾四周，震惊地发现我是车上唯一的乘客了。

lines.english: 'You'll have to get off here,'
lines.chinese: “你必须在这里下车，”
lines.raw: 'You'll have to get off here,' | “你必须在这里下车，”

lines.english: the conductor said. 'This is as far as we go.'
lines.chinese: 售票员说。“我们只能到这里了。”
lines.raw: the conductor said. 'This is as far as we go.' | 售票员说。“我们只能到这里了。”

lines.english: 'Is this Woodford Green?' I asked.
lines.chinese: “这是伍德福德格林吗？”我问道。
lines.raw: 'Is this Woodford Green?' I asked. | “这是伍德福德格林吗？”我问道。

lines.english: 'Oh dear,' said the conductor suddenly.
lines.chinese: “哦，天哪，”售票员突然说道。
lines.raw: 'Oh dear,' said the conductor suddenly. | “哦，天哪，”售票员突然说道。

lines.english: 'I forgot to put you off.'
lines.chinese: “我忘了让你下车了。”
lines.raw: 'I forgot to put you off.' | “我忘了让你下车了。”

lines.english: 'It doesn't matter,' I said. 'I'll get off here.'
lines.chinese: “没关系，”我说，“我就在这里下车。”
lines.raw: 'It doesn't matter,' I said. 'I'll get off here.' | “没关系，”我说，“我就在这里下车。”

lines.english: 'We're going back now,' said the conductor.
lines.chinese: “我们现在要回去了，”售票员说。
lines.raw: 'We're going back now,' said the conductor. | “我们现在要回去了，”售票员说。

lines.english: 'Well, in that case,
lines.chinese: “好吧，既然如此，”
lines.raw: 'Well, in that case, | “好吧，既然如此，”

lines.english: I prefer to stay on the bus,' I answered.
lines.chinese: 我宁愿留在车上，”我回答道。
lines.raw: I prefer to stay on the bus,' I answered. | 我宁愿留在车上，”我回答道。
